org.docgene.model

Class XMLChapter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParent
      • org.docgene.model.XMLChapter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.AnchorElement, JustifiedElement, ParagraphElement, ParagraphElementParent, StyledElement, org.docgene.model.TitledElement, org.docgene.model.TitleOrIncludeElement, XMLParent

    public class XMLChapter
extends org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParent
implements ParagraphElementParent, ParagraphElement, org.docgene.model.TitledElement, JustifiedElement
    Represents a chapter.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParent

        chapters, paragraphs

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.JustifiedElement

        ALIGNMENT_CENTER, ALIGNMENT_INHERIT, ALIGNMENT_JUSTIFIED, ALIGNMENT_LEFT, ALIGNMENT_NONE, ALIGNMENT_RIGHT, JUSTIFIED_AUTO, JUSTIFIED_CHARACTER, JUSTIFIED_INHERIT, JUSTIFIED_NONE, JUSTIFIED_WORD
